policies.description: All personnel must have hair completely covered by a hairnet or hat. Long hair must be tied back.
Disposable gloves must be worn when handling cooked food, salads, or garnishes.
violation_triggers: Bare hand contact with cooked food

policies.description: Staff must wash hands after touching face, phone, trash, or raw protein.
violation_triggers: Touching face then food without wash

policies.description: Raw meat must be handled on RED cutting boards only. Never near vegetables.
Prep surfaces must be wiped down and sanitized between different ingredients.
